ModuleMessage.Subject: H:CS3 H:CS4 for your attention.
ModuleMessage.Text:
You've been selected for distribution of the item described below.
Item: H:CS4 Created: H:ON Closed Date: H:D7
Description: H:CL1
Please logon to your DevonWay dashboard and search for this item if you'd like more information.
Thank You,
DevonWay Administrators

ModuleMessage.Subject: #{IF(&Status = 'CL', 'Closure', 'Cancellation')} Notice for H:CS4
ModuleMessage.Text:
You requested email notification upon closure. Created Date: DateToString(H:ON,'dd MMM yyyy') H:P1:Meaning Date: DateToString(H:D1,'dd MMM yyyy') Title: H:CS1 Description: Substring(H:CL1,0,1000)#{IF(Length(H:CL1)>1000,'...','')}#{IF(H:R7 != NULL,'
Source: '|H:R7:CS1,'')}}#{IF(H:R12 != NULL,'
Type: '|H:R12:CS1,'')}#{IF(&Status='CA','

Reason for Cancellation: '|GetCancelReason(),'')}
Login

ModuleMessage.Subject: Comment added to H:CS4
ModuleMessage.Text:
#{List(C1:N1|') ['|C1:CS1|'] '|VAL(XH:FullName, &Module = "PERSON" AND XH:Enabled != NULL AND &ID = C1:U1)|' ('|DateToString(C1:D1,'MM/dd/yyyy')||C1:T1|'):
'|C1:CL1|'',C1:N1=max(C1:N1),'')}
Created On: DateToString(H:ON,'dd MMM yyyy') Title: H:CS1 Description: Substring(H:CL1,0,1000)#{IF(Length(H:CL1)>1000,'...','')}#{IF(H:R7 != NULL,'
Source: '|H:R7:CS1,'')}}#{IF(H:R12 != NULL,'
Type: '|H:R12:CS1,'')}
View Details
#{List(C1:N1|') ['|C1:CS1|'] '|VAL(XH:FullName, &Module = "PERSON" AND XH:Enabled != NULL AND &ID = C1:U1)|' ('|DateToString(C1:D1,'dd MMMMM yyyy')||C1:T1|'):
'|C1:CL1|'
','')}

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:N9 < 2010 OR VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'CAUSAL') = NULL AND NUM(C7) + NUM(C5) = 0
H:P1:Factor >= 2010 AND C8:R1 = NULL AND !&BatchMode AND &Status != 'CA'
H:N6 >= 3010 AND VAL(&ID,&Module = 'INVK-CRA01' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID AND XH:N5 != NULL AND XH:N5 = C8:CID) != NULL

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: VAL(&ID,&Module = 'INVK-CRA01' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID AND XH:N5 != NULL AND XH:N5 = C8:CID)

New( &ID ,&Module = 'INVK-CRA01' ,XH:CL1 = C8:CL1 ;XH:R10 = C8:R4 ;XH:R8 = C8:R3 ;XH:R4 = &ID ;XH:RA = H:RA ;XH:D4 = C8:D1 ;XH:N5 = C8:CID ,IF(H:R11:P1:CODE = 'INVK-PER-P1-1',H:R11:U1,VAL(&ID,&Module = 'PERSON' AND XH:UserName = 'SystemUser')) )

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: Num(&ID,&Module = 'INVK-CRC01' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID AND &ID NOT IN LIST(C7:R1)) > 0
H:N4 > 0 AND (H:P1 != &LastSavedValue OR H:R9 != &LastSavedValue OR H:R10 != &LastSavedValue OR H:R11 != &LastSavedValue)

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: ADD(C15:R1 = &ID, &Module = 'INVK-EFR' and XH:R4 = &ID /**generated from**/ and &ID not in list(C15:R1) )
Enter the results of the Extent of Condition investigation
NUM(C8:R1, C8:R1:Status!='Cancelled') /** Actions that are not Cancelled **/
NUM(C8:R1, C8:R1:Status='Open') /** Actions that are Open **/
XH:P1:Code='INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:CS5!=NULL AND XH:U1 != Null
XH:P1:Code='INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:CS5!=NULL AND XH:U1 != Null
XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-REF-P1-1' AND XH:P2:CODE = 'INVK-REF-P2-1' AND &ID NOT IN LIST(C18:R1)
XH:P1:Code='INVK-PER-P1-1' AND XH:CS5!=NULL AND XH:U1 != Null
XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-REF-P1-1' AND XH:P2:CODE = 'INVK-REF-P2-2' AND &ID IN LIST(XC1:R1,&Module = 'INVK-SIG' AND &ID != NULL AND &ID = H:R9,XC1:R1 != NULL)

{ "ReportBook": { "name": "Print", "author": "&Person", "exportDate": "&Today", "identifierFourPrompt": " ", "identifierThreePrompt": " ", "identifierTwoPrompt": " ", "identifierOnePrompt": " ", "includePageNumbersFlag": true, "includeTOCFlag": false, "includeTitleFlag": false, "outputFileName": " ", "pageIdentifierLocation": "BR" }, "ObjectIds": [#{REPLACE(&ID||LIST(C8:R1)||LIST(C15:R1),' ',',')} ], "ModulePreferences": [ { "moduleCode": "INVK-CR01", "printOptionCode": "INVK-CR01-O-3", "identifierOne": "CS4", "identifierTwo": "R5 ", "identifierThree": "D2 ", "identifierFour": " CS1", "pageIdentifier": "CS4" }, { "moduleCode": "INVK-CRA01", "printOptionCode": "INVK-CRA01-O-2", "identifierOne": "CS4", "identifierTwo": "R5", "identifierThree": "D2 ", "identifierFour": " CS1", "pageIdentifier": "CS4" } , { "moduleCode": "INVK-EFR", "printOptionCode": "INVK-EFR-O-2", "identifierOne": "CS4", "identifierTwo": "R5", "identifierThree": "D2 ", "identifierFour": " CS1", "pageIdentifier": "CS4" } ] }

#{IF(H:CB1 = 'Y','
RESTRICTED ACCESS
','')}
Type to display list of assignees or click gear to search
XH:P1:Code='INVK-PER-P1-1' /** Status = Active **/ and XH:U1 <> NULL /** User Account has been created **/

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: C1:CID != NULL AND C1:U1 != &PersonID /** Comment By != Current User **/ AND H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1'

ModuleRuleName.Name: Comment Not Made by Signed On User; Not Admin/Coordinator/Debug

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: Fields marked with a red asterisk (*) are required to submit this CAPA.

ModuleRuleName.Name: Reassign this Task != NULL; On Save
Closed Date = NULL; WF Step = Closed
Reassign this Task = Person Reference; On Save

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:VR1=H:R3 /** Reassign this Task = Current Assignee **/
H:ID = NULL AND H:VN2 = NULL AND &ObjectType != 'M' AND &LaunchPoint != NULL

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: The Date Identified (H:D8) cannot be in the future.

ModuleRuleName.Name: INV - Inv Type and Eval Req: Sig Level = NULL or INV Type = N/A

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:P1:Factor >= 2010 AND VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'EXTENT_OF_CONDITION') != NULL AND !&BatchMode AND &Status != 'CA'
!&ReadOnly AND H:P1:Factor <= 2010 AND NUM(C18:R1,C18:R1:P1:CODE = 'INVK-INV-P1-1' ) < NUM(&ID,&Module = 'INVK-INV' AND XH:P1:CODE = 'INVK-INV-P1-1')

ModuleRuleName.Name: Task <= Eval; Number of Investigation Types < avaiable; Not Read Only

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: ADD(C2:R1=&ID, &Module='INVK-CRA01' and XH:R4=&ID and XH:R4!=NULL and XH:P4:CODE = 'INVK-CRA01-P4-1' and &ID not in LIST(C2:R1) )
Add(C5:R1 = &ID, &Module = 'INVK-FISH' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID AND &ID NOT IN LIST(C5:R1))
ADD(C8:R1 = &ID, &Module = 'INVK-CRA01' and XH:R4 != NULL and XH:R4 = &ID and &ID not in list(C8:R1) )

#{IF(H:CB1 = 'Y','
RESTRICTED ACCESS
','')}
All Effectiveness Reviews must be submitted to complete this task.
All Actions must be submitted to complete this task.

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:P1 != &LastSavedValue OR (H:VN2 = NULL AND H:ID = NULL)
H:N6 > H:N9 AND (H:P1 != &LastSavedValue OR H:R9 != H:VN3)

ModuleRuleName.Name: Set Due Date to Rollback offset

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: VAL(XC1:N2,&Module = 'INVK-SIG' AND &ID != NULL AND &ID = H:R9, XC1:CS1 = H:P1:CODE)
H:D2 + SUM(XC2:N1,&Module = 'INVK-SIG' AND &ID != NULL AND &ID = H:R9, XC2:N3 > H:P1:Factor AND XC2:N3 < 4010)
H:D2 + SUM(XC2:N1,&Module = 'INVK-SIG' AND &ID != NULL AND &ID = H:R9, XC2:N3 > H:P1:Factor)

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: ( H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1' AND &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ AND H:VN5 != &PersonID /** Not Assignee's Manager **/ ) OR H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-6' OR &HighlightedTask = NULL

ModuleRuleName.Name: Lock - Due Date: Not Admin or Assignee's Manager

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:ID = NULL OR &Status != 'OP' OR ( H:D2 = NULL AND H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1' AND &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ AND H:VN5 != &PersonID /** Not Assignee's Manager **/ )
&HighlightedTask = NULL AND H:ID != NULL AND H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1'
&Status = 'CL' AND C15:R1:P3:CODE = "INVK-EFR-P3-1" AND C15:R1:Status = 'Closed' AND C15:R1:N6 > C15:N2 /** Closed; EFR Action = Reopen CAPA; EFR Task = Closed; Reopen Check not checked **/
C15:R1:P3:CODE = "INVK-EFR-P3-1" AND C15:R1:Status = 'Closed' AND H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-3' /** Action = Reopen CAPA; EFR Task = Closed; CAPA in Evaluation **/
(&Stage = 'SAVE' OR &Stage = 'COMPLETE') AND H:N2 > GetLastSavedValue(H:N2) AND H:N2 !=0

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: VAL(XC2:N1,&Module = 'INVK-SIG' AND &ID != NULL AND &ID = H:R9, XC2:CS1 = H:P1:CODE)

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-3' AND (NUM(C8:R1,C8:R1:STATUS != 'Cancelled') > 0 OR VAL(C18:R1, C18:R1:CS3 = 'ACTION_PLAN') = NULL)
H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-6' AND H:R3 != NULL AND VAL(C10:R1,C10:R1 = H:R3) = NULL

ModuleRuleTarget.TargetUserLogic: REPLACE( LIST(C10:R1:U1, C10:R1:MODULE = 'INVK-PER')/**CAPA RAC**/ ||LIST(XC2:R1:U1,&Module = 'INVK-CRA01' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID,XC2:R1:U1 != NULL)/** Action RAC**/ ||LIST(XC2:R1:U1,&Module = 'INVK-EFR' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID,XC2:R1:U1 != NULL)/** EFR RAC **/ ,' ',',')
REPLACE( LIST(C10:R1:N1,C10:R1:MODULE = 'INVK-TEAM')/**CAPA RAC**/ ||LIST(XC2:R1:N1,&Module = 'INVK-EFR' AND XH:R4 != NULL AND XH:R4 = &ID,XC2:R1:N1 != NULL)/**EFR RAC**/ ,' ',',')

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: 1=0 /** Disabled for Demos **/ AND &Role != 'INVK-A' AND &Role != 'INVK-D' AND &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ AND !(&PersonID = H:R10:U1 AND H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-3') /** Issue Owner during Evaluation **/ AND H:VN5 != &PersonID /** Not Assignee's Manager **/

ModuleRuleName.Name: INV - Act as Assignee TEMPORARILY DISABLED FOR DEMOS

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: ((H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1' OR H:P1:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-P1-3') AND H:CB2 != 'Y') OR NUM(C8:R1,C8:R1:STATUS != 'Cancelled') > 0 OR VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'CAUSAL') != NULL
H:CB2 = NULL /** No Actions are necessary **/

ModuleRuleName.Name: No Actions are Necessary != Y (Actions Required)

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: ( H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1' AND &Role != 'INVK-C' /** Coordinator **/ ) OR H:P1:CODE = 'INVK-CR01-P1-6' OR &HighlightedTask = NULL
&HighlightedTask != 'INVK-CR01-WF-I-I' AND &HighlightedTask != 'INVK-CR01-WF-S1-T1' AND H:ID != NULL AND H:VP2:CODE != 'INVK-CR01-VP2-1'
H:P1:Factor >= 2010 AND !&BatchMode AND &Status != 'CA' AND VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'CAUSAL') != NULL
H:P1:Factor >= 2010 AND !&BatchMode AND &Status != 'CA' AND VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'ACTION_PLAN') != NULL AND H:CB2 != 'Y'
H:N9 < 2010 OR (VAL(C18:R1,C18:R1:CS3 = 'EXTENT_OF_CONDITION') = NULL AND H:CL7 = NULL)

ModuleRuleName.Name: REQ - Effectiveness Review: Requirement Selected; In Closure

ModuleRule.RuleUserLogic: C8:R1:Status = 'Open' /** Corrective Action Status **/ OR C8:R1 = NULL

ObjectHelp.HelpText: Document additional incident/issue related comments, notes, findings

CAPAs have restricted access when generated from an Event record or when the CAPA is administratively selected as controlled from the Additional Details Tab.
When restricted, access is granted through this table and extended to users that have access to related CAPA Actions, Effectiveness Reviews, and parent Event when applicable.

ScreenLayout.Name: EvaluationRequirementsRequiredByInvestigationType
ScreenLayout.FieldPrompt: Evaluation Requirements - Required by Investigation Type

ObjectHelp.HelpText: Allows the user to jump to an external web page for additional information or document collaboration. Please note, this application cannot correct or bypass link errors or required access. Linked documents are not included in the printable report book.
Provide comments, details or summary of document.
Provide the name of the document.

Describe the incident/issue as clearly and concisely as possible, including the process of what should have occurred, location, any applicable guidance document(s), deviation from those document(s), and any potential or known consequences.
